extension_description.message: Automatically closes tabs and sleeps pinned tabs after a configurable time - Works on all Firefox/Zen workspaces

close_after_hours.description: Time period before tabs are closed

exclude_pinned_tabs.message: Sleep pinned tabs instead of closing
exclude_pinned_tabs.description: Option to discard pinned tabs instead of closing them

exclude_audible_tabs.description: Option to exclude tabs that are playing audio

force_process.description: Button to force immediate processing of old tabs
